2234530.name: Pera: Episode 1 - Fjord Island
2234530.description:
A Kaemi is a being capable of summoning a spirit and acquiring its abilities.

All communication from Fjord Island got lost after an artic storm engulfed the island. The herald sent from the City of Pera did not come back.

In Pera: Episode 1 - Fjord Island, players join Gabriel Nightgale, a Kaemi dispatched from the City of Pera, to investigate the mystery surrounding Fjord Island.

As Gabriel Nightgale, players will explore the island, collect clues and evidences, and overcome obstacles in order to solve the mystery.

Pera: Episode 1 is a short story driven game set in an atmospheric island and focused on solving a mystery.
